creator: aguzman@pendulosoftware.com
text:
Hi ! I have that problem, i download DVD iso image (FreeBSD-9.1-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso)) from yours site, install system, but when i try add packages from sysinstall, i have this error: 

"Warning: The disc currently in the drive is either not a FreeBSD disc or it is an older (pre 2.1.5) FreeBSD CD which does not have a version number on it.  Do you wish to use this disc anyway? "

And is unable to install if you choose go anyway

My image SHA256 is:

SHA256 (FreeBSD-9.1-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso) = 7955f97e25985915013c1568319752c4006e722539c65723685923e343c3b5dc

Related PR: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=175094
! Thanks !

How-To-Repeat: try to install a distribution packages from sysinstall
